subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory, thanksgiving and splendor belong exclusively to the true Thanksgiver, Who through this exalted Word hath raised His servants unto the summit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا شکر و بها مخصوص شاکر حقیقی است که باینکلمه علیا عباد خود را بذروه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action
